title: Assertion contrib/orc/c++/src/io/Cache.cc:101: static std::vector<ReadRange> orc::ReadRangeCombiner::coalesceReadRanges(std::vector<ReadRange>, uint64_t, uint64_t): Assertion `rangeSizeLimit > holeSizeLimit' failed
description:
### Describe the bug
Maybe not related to Iceberg writes.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal('/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/f0/', ORC);
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) SETTINGS allow_experimental_insert_into_iceberg = 1 SELECT c0 FROM generateRandom('c0 Int', 147394492629158618, 6698, 2) LIMIT 55;
SELECT c0 FROM t0 SETTINGS max_download_buffer_size = 8, remote_read_min_bytes_for_seek = 10485760; --Assertion error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Stack trace:
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id INTEGER, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t2 (ref_id, value) SELECT id, RANDOM() * 100 FROM t1 WHERE id < 3;
SELECT t1.name, t2.value FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t2.value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Assertion failure in ReadRangeCombiner coalesceReadRanges function
